name_cn:
CHANEL 25A Runway Edition
Size: 20x13x7(cm)
25A New Fall/Winter Makeup Bag 🆕 This popular style is highly recommended by Chanel. It is an elegant and luxurious bag that can serve as a vintage makeup box for various collections. The bag features double C logos, giving it a strong vintage retro vibe. It has a regular and structured shape, suitable for various occasions. It can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody! It also features an automatic lock, 14k pale gold hardware, and imported lambskin~ The texture is soft and worth buying, exuding nobility everywhere.
